question_text: A book is resting on a table. Which of the following is true about the forces acting on the book?

options.label: A
options.text: The weight force is greater than the normal force

options.label: B
options.text: The forces are balanced and the book is in equilibrium

options.label: C
options.text: There is only one force acting on the book

options.label: D
options.text: The normal force is much smaller than the weight

explanation: When an object is at rest on a surface, the upward normal force from the table exactly balances the downward weight force. These balanced forces mean the object remains stationary.
